title: Dauntless (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dauntless''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Dauntless (Imperial I-class)|''Dauntless'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Dauntless (Imperial II-class)|''Dauntless'']]''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Dauntless (VT-49 Decimator)|''Dauntless'']]''', a [[VT-49 Decimator]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Dauntless (Imperial-class Star Destroyer)/Legends|'''''Dauntless''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Dauntless (Valor-class)|''Dauntless'']]''', a [[Valor-class cruiser|''Valor''-class cruiser]].
*'''[[Dauntless (Venator-class)|''Dauntless'']]''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Dauntless (VT-49 Decimator)/Legends|''Dauntless'']]''', a [[VT-49 Decimator/Legends|VT-49 Decimator]].
*'''[[Dauntless (cruiser)|''Dauntless'']]''', a ship of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
*'''[[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']]''', a [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Dauntless-class heavy cruiser|''Dauntless''-class heavy cruiser]]''', a class of [[Cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]].
